creator: m_josenhans@web.de
text:
Looks like erlang 17.4 binary package is installed as latest version, however the WX-flag is deactivated again. Jimmy could you please provide background information. 

pkg info  erlang-runtime17-17.4
erlang-runtime17-17.4
Name           : erlang-runtime17
Version        : 17.4
Installed on   : Wed Jan 14 17:41:25 CET 2015
Origin         : lang/erlang-runtime17
Architecture   : freebsd:10:x86:64
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : parallel lang java
Licenses       : 
Maintainer     : olgeni@FreeBSD.org
WWW            : http://www.erlang.org/
Comment        : Functional programming language from Ericsson
Options        :
        DOCS           : on
        DTRACE         : off
        GCC            : off
        GS             : off
        HIPE           : off
        JAVA           : off
        KQUEUE         : on
        ODBC           : off
        OPENSSL        : on
        SCTP           : on
        SMP            : on
        THREADS        : on
        WX             : off
Shared Libs required:
        libcrypto.so.7
        libc.so.7
Annotations    :
        repo_type      : binary
        repository     : FreeBSD
Flat size      : 260MiB
